name: Whack-A-Mole
message: The Albert ascent was definitely the toughest so far. Keep cookin’!!!

name: Kee
message: Whoo hoo!! You go girl!! Congrats on 100 miles!!

name: Lindsey
message: Thunderstorms and wind tonight. Hope you're still able to get some good rest. Enjoy the Blue Ridge Mountain scape. It's a toughie but a beauty.

name: Zen
message: Franklin is my hometown! I believe there is a shuttle that still takes you into town from the trail head! Checkout lazy hiker & outdoor 76 🤍
